title: The Reason for 'Uthmin ' s Removal of Abu Musa [al -Ash'ari) from Bagrah
description: dal-Ash'ari/ from Bagrah It was transmitted to me in writing by al-Sari-Shu'ayb-SayfMuhammad and Talhah: When 'Uthman took office, he retained Abu Musa in Ba$rah for three years, deposing him in the fourth. He appointed 'Umayr b. 'Uthman b. Sa'd as military commander of Khurasan, and 'Abdallah b. 'Umayr al-Laythi from [the tribe of] [2829] Kinanah54 as military commander in Sijistan.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
